mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_inquiry ( writer_id, admin_id, category, content, answer, answered_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{writerId}, #{adminId}, #{category}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{answeredAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT ai.id, m.nickname, ai.category, ai.answer, ai.answered_at, ai.created_at FROM admin_inquiry ai LEFT JOIN member m ON ai.writer_id = m.id ORDER BY ai.created_at ${order}

SELECT ai.id, m.nickname, ai.category, ai.answer, ai.answered_at, ai.created_at FROM admin_inquiry ai LEFT JOIN member m ON ai.writer_id = m.id WHERE ai.writer_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ai.created_at ${order}

SELECT ai.id, m.nickname AS writerNickname, ai.category, ai.content, ai.answer, am.nickname AS adminNickname, ai.answered_at AS answeredAt, ai.created_at AS createdAt FROM admin_inquiry ai JOIN member m ON ai.writer_id = m.id LEFT JOIN member am ON ai.admin_id = am.id WHERE ai.id = #{inquiryId}
